differential_diagnoses: Dengue hemorrhagic fever with dengue shock syndrome
Septic shock (secondary to translocation in cirrhotic/portal hypertensive patient)
next_steps: Obtain formal echocardiography to evaluate for myocarditis versus septic cardiomyopathy
Perform repeat thick and thin blood smears for malaria
Send serum for Dengue (NS1, IgM/IgG), Leptospirosis (PCR/serology), and Yellow Fever testing
Order HLH diagnostic panel including ferritin, triglycerides, fibrinogen, and soluble CD25
Initiate urgent hematology and infectious disease consultations
Trend serum lactate, procalcitonin, and complete blood count with smear review
Maintain hemodynamic support with goal-directed fluid management considering pulmonary edema and capillary leak
